channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Iran's supreme leader, in first remarks, vows to avenge martyrs, keep strait closed
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran’s new supreme leader vows to keep Hormuz shut in defiant first remarks

- Iran's new supreme leader vows to block Strait of Hormuz in first statement
- Iran’s new supreme leader vows to keep Strait of Hormuz closed
- Mojtaba Khamenei, Iran’s New Supreme Leader, Says Strait of Hormuz Must Remain Closed in Defiant Statement

- Mojtaba Khamenei, Iran’s New Supreme Leader, Says Strait of Hormuz Must Remain Closed in Defiant Statement

- In first remarks, Iran’s new supreme leader vows to avenge martyrs, keep Strait of Hormuz closed
- Iran’s new supreme leader issues first statement
- Iran's new leader issues first statement: Strait of Hormuz must remain closed until war ends
- New Iranian supreme leader calls for defiance, keeps key waterway shut
- Iran’s supreme leader, in first remarks, vows to avenge martyrs, keep strait closed
- Flash: Iran's supreme leader urges for continuation of Strait of Hormuz closure]]>

- Iran targets fuel facilities, sending oil soaring again]]>
